subcodes.first_line: O noble one! God willing, mayest thou attain unto the supreme nobility - that nobility which hath been from time immemorial and shall ever remain with God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شریف انشاالله بشرافت کبری فائز شوی و آن شرافت که لم یزل و لایزال عندالله
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
